description: Valpas provides hotels with hardware, monitoring, and digital certification to keep rooms bed bug-safe and display that status to travelers and buyers. Its website also lists certified hotels and offers booking/search experiences for travelers and travel managers.
summary: valpashotels.com exposes public hotel-directory and travel-manager web surfaces plus an authenticated Valpas member web app; no public developer API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI documentation was found.
